content.en:
Source Sea, Gray Mist Stone Statue.

Ye Tian looked at the gray mist stone statue in front of him and became even more curious about it.

According to the Lord of the Frostless, the traces on the Grey Mist are those left behind by the Eternal Master, who is able to cross the timeline and even attack the future across time and space.

It could even be said that the Eternal Master could appear here at any time.

"At the beginning, the Eternal Master must have had a short fight for this Gray Mist Stone Statue, and even entered the inside of the Gray Mist Stone Statue, and in the end, he may have obtained what he wanted, or he didn't find what he needed, and then gave up this Gray Mist Stone Statue!" Ye Tian guessed.

Either way, the fact that this Grey Mist Stone Statue was able to attract the attention of the Eternal Ruler was enough to prove that it was extraordinary.

In addition, even the traces of the "One-Eleven-Three" Eternal Controller are enough to make the Legendary Lord comprehend for a long time.

"First make a copy of the body here to comprehend the traces of the Eternal Master's attack, and the other copy body enters the inside of the Gray Mist Stone Statue!"

Ye Tian decided.

Wow!

A replica body was quickly copied, and then this replica body began to comprehend here, while the other replica body was ready to enter the interior of the Gray Mist Stone Statue, so that even if a replica body fell, at least it could continue to replicate a new replica body, and continue to explore and advance.

Otherwise, if there was only one replica body, once it fell, Ye Tian would need to re-enter the time and space where the Gray Mist Stone Statue was located.

Bang!!!!

Ye Tian used a door defense method, and only then did he rush into the crack of the Gray Mist Stone Statue and enter the inside of the Gray Mist Stone Statue.

......

Airplanes!!!!

Waves of violent power turned into rays of light and blasted towards Ye Tian.

These powers are enough to wreak havoc on ordinary Legendary Lords, and if they go deeper, even ordinary Legendary Lords will fall.

However, the attacks of these forces fell on Ye Tian's body, only setting off a ripple, and they couldn't cause any damage to Ye Tian at all.

Ye Tian stepped into the interior of the Gray Mist Stone Statue step by step, and went deeper and deeper.

Soon.

Ye Tian saw a bridge, which seemed to be completely composed of a special energy, crossing into the depths of the Endless Void.

Ye Tian felt that the bridge was a little weird, so he prepared to bypass it from other directions.

However, something strange happened.

No matter which direction he shuttles from, he will be moved to the entrance of the bridge by an inexplicable force.

In other words, he had to cross the bridge to move forward, otherwise there was no way to move on.

This bridge is a must-see!

"Looks like we have to cross this bridge!

Ye Tian muttered.

He stepped onto the bridge, and in an instant it became gray and foggy, and he couldn't see any direction.

So, he continued to walk, and after walking for an unknown amount of time, he returned to the entrance to the bridge.

"It's strange, I'm walking forward, and I'm back at the entrance!"

Ye Tian was puzzled.

He walked many times, and still reached the entrance of the bridge as he had done before.

"Cast countless avatars and look in all directions. "

Immediately, Ye Tian's body differentiated into countless incarnations, and these incarnations poured into the bridge, but they were quickly annihilated one by one.

The way the avatar found the direction was not at all, and the mysterious power contained in this bridge directly annihilated his avatar.

"If the incarnation can't work, then let the replica body not be explored again and again, I don't believe that I can't go through!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

But then, whether he shuttled, or flew at great speed, or by other means, he could not cross the bridge, and he would return to the entrance of the bridge.

Moreover, once he enters the bridge, his perception cannot go beyond the confines of the bridge, and the copy talent can only sense the talent of life, but it has no effect on this bridge.

After trying many times, Ye Tian stopped this unplanned behavior, and instead calmed down happily

"There must be a sense that this bridge must be built here, and there should be a special way to cross this bridge, and I haven't mastered this way yet, so I can't cross this bridge anyway?"

Thinking like this, Ye Tian roughly understood, and began to look for this way.

Then, he walked into the bridge, and immediately found himself in a gray fog again........

This time, instead of moving on, he came to his senses in the gray mist.

Time passes slowly.

At first, Ye Tian was very confused, but gradually, he realized something.

"I understand, this gray fog area has the effect of interfering with the rules, every fog particle contains various innate eternal rules, and the countless gray fog is a large array created by countless innate eternal rules, and being in this big array is disturbed all the time. If you want to cross this bridge, you must reach a certain level of innate eternal rules, and be able to understand the rules here, so that you can reach the other end of the bridge without being disturbed by the gray fog area. "

Ye Tianming enlightened.

In other words, he doesn't have a deep understanding of the innate eternal rules, and it is difficult to cross this bridge.

Immediately, Ye Tian was overjoyed again.

The mist in this gray fog area is constantly surging, and it also represents the continuous change of a kind of innate eternal rules, and the changes in the innate eternal rules here will help Ye Tian comprehend those eternal paths.

In fact, there is also a very powerful Eternal Dao here, the Grey Mist Eternal Dao.

The Gray Mist Eternal Dao involves the Innate Eternal Rules of Space, the Innate Eternal Rules of Time, the Innate Eternal Rules of Darkness, and the Innate Eternal Rules of Water. 0.9

Of course, if you want to realize the Eternal Path of Gray Mist, the difficulty is also extremely great.

For Ye Tian, it is undoubtedly the best way to comprehend other Eternal Dao with the help of this place at present, and he can use this bridge to verify it at any time, so that he can raise his Eternal Dao to a higher level.

And once you cross this bridge, I am afraid that you will encounter a real chance.

"Let's go here and see it!"

Ye Tian decided.

The Eternal Dao that he mainly contemplated was the Eternal Dao of Ten Thousand Beings and the Eternal Dao of Mixed Yuan, and he wanted to cultivate one of his Eternal Daos to the Dacheng realm or even the Consummation realm as soon as possible.

And now, the Mixed Yuan Eternal Dao has reached the realm of Xiaocheng, and it is still very far from the realm of Dacheng.

In the blink of an eye, tens of thousands of eternal years have passed. _
